findings.actenon_implementation: ActionIntent/PCCB proof gate; ProtectedExecutor; Receipt/Refusal; replay/escrow protection.

findings.generic_control: add a proof/authorization check before execution; emit an audit receipt/log for allowed and refused decisions; add replay/idempotency protection.
findings.title: MCP tool may reach file mutation
findings.why_this_matters: This appears to be an MCP/tool-exposed handler where a model-selected tool call may reach file mutation via `tool_invocation`. Static analysis did not find a visible proof gate, Receipt/Refusal emission, or replay/idempotency protection between the decision source and the side effect. This is the scanner's model/agent decision -> side effect -> no visible proof gate shape. Runtime reachability, exploitability, production exposure, and business impact are not proven by this scan.

not_vulnerability_severity_explanation: This is not a vulnerability severity rating. It is a consequence-class map of candidate action surfaces found by static analysis.
